items.title: Ollama releases: v0.30.10
items.description:
## What's Changed

* Command A and North family models now run on Apple Silicon with the MLX engine
* Updated the underlying llama.cpp engine to build 9672
* Fixed build artifacts for MLX

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ollama/ollama/compare/v0.30.9...v0.30.10

metal : implement rope_back operator (#24725)

rotation, avoiding duplicate kernel code.

items.description:
<details open>

metal : add f16 and bf16 support for concat operator (#24724)

* metal : add f16 and bf16 support for concat operator

Extend the Metal backend concat operator to support f16 and bf16 tensor
types in addition to the existing f32 and i32 support.
